problem: What physical process in the brain produces subjective conscious experience?
mechanism: Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis
hypothesis: If Vagus nerve stimulation modulating brain-gut axis is applied to subjective, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
